tasks.subject: Layer P Task 1: spec.graph_file loader convention
tasks.description:
**Goal:** YAML's `spec.graph_file: <path>` inlines a JSON file's contents into `cfg.spec.graph` at config load. Engine-agnostic. Mutually exclusive with `spec.graph`.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/config.py
- Modify: tests/core/test_config.py

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -v -k graph_file

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -v -k graph_file", "acceptanceCriteria": ["spec.graph_file inlines JSON into cfg.spec[graph]", "absolute path used verbatim", "both set raises ValidationError", "missing file raises with path in message", "invalid JSON raises with parse error", "relative path resolves against YAML parent dir"]}
```

tasks.subject: Layer P Task 2: ComfyUI custom-node SHA pinning
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend ComfyUI engine's provision to honor a `ref` field in each `custom_nodes` entry (commit SHA). When present, `git checkout <ref>` runs after the clone. Absent → clone-HEAD (back-compat).

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py
- Modify: tests/engines/test_comfyui.py

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v -k "ref or sha or checkout"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v -k 'ref or sha or checkout'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ref set runs git checkout after clone", "no ref skips checkout (back-compat)", "call order clone -> checkout -> requirements"]}
```

tasks.subject: Layer P Task 3: RunPodProvider.find_instance_by_tag helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add tag-discovery helper on RunPodProvider that scans list_instances() for a ready pod matching tags[key] == value. Used by live smoke for warm-pod reuse.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py
- Modify: tests/providers/test_runpod.py

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod.py -v -k find_instance_by_tag

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py", "tests/providers/test_runpod.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod.py -v -k find_instance_by_tag", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ready+match -> returned", "starting+match -> None", "no match -> None"]}
```

tasks.subject: Layer P Task 4: _RecordingHTTPSeam ComfyUI dispatch extension
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Refactor Layer N's _RecordingHTTPSeam to accept a dispatch callable so the same wrapper supports both GraphQL-query-based RunPod dispatcher and URL-pattern-based ComfyUI dispatcher.

**Files:**
- Modify: tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py
- Modify: tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py
- Modify: tests/live/test_runpod_live.py

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py tests/providers/test_runpod.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py", "tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py", "tests/live/test_runpod_live.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py tests/providers/test_runpod.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dispatch=_RUNPOD_DISPATCH preserves Layer N", "dispatch=_COMFY_DISPATCH dispatches by URL", "prompt_submit.json carries request body in _meta", "history last-poll wins", "redaction applies to _meta.request_body too", "unknown URL writes unknown_<sha>.json"]}
```

tasks.subject: Layer P Task 5: Live test skeleton tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create live smoke skeleton — single function test_runpod_comfyui_wan_live_e2e_smoke, in-process, phase-marker structured, KEEP_POD-aware, tag-reuse-aware. Module-gated by env vars; skips silently in CI. NO live run yet.

**Files:**
- Create: tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py --collect-only -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py --collect-only -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ruff+mypy clean", "collect reports skipped without env vars", "module gated on 4 env vars", "10 phase markers", "KEEP_POD path skips destroy", "tag-reuse path skips create+poll", "generate asserts size+magic+capability_key+output sink"]}
```

tasks.subject: Layer P Task 6: Example YAML + graph JSON scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fill runpod-comfyui-wan.yaml with spec.graph_file + custom_nodes SHA-pin placeholders + multi-entry models list. Create placeholder graph JSON. Both are scaffolding — Task 7 replaces with real values.

**Files:**
- Modify: examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.yaml
- Create: examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.graph.json
- Possibly Modify: tests/test_examples.py

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/test_examples.py -v -k runpod_comfyui_wan

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.yaml", "examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.graph.json", "tests/test_examples.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_examples.py -v -k runpod_comfyui_wan", "acceptanceCriteria": ["YAML loads via Config.load", "cfg.spec[graph] is dict matching JSON", "custom_nodes has 2+ entries with ref:PINME", "models has 3 placeholder entries", "header comment documents Task 7 will pin"]}
```

tasks.subject: Layer P Task 7: Live shake-out — capture real MP4 + fixtures + SHAs + model set
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drive live smoke against real RunPod until green MP4 ships. Capture 3 ComfyUI fixtures, real SHAs, actual Wan 2.2 file set, exported workflow. Every bug surfaced → in-scope production fix with regression test.

**Files (iteratively):**
- Modify: examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.yaml + .graph.json
- Create: tests/engines/fixtures/comfyui/{prompt_submit,history_done,view,last_smoke}.json
- Modify: tests/providers/fixtures/runpod/*.json
- Iteratively: any production file where bug surfaces + regression test

**Verify:** KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS=1 RUNPOD_API_KEY=... RUNPOD_TERMINATE_KEY=... HF_TOKEN=... pixi run pytest tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py -v -s

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/engines/fixtures/comfyui/prompt_submit.json", "tests/engines/fixtures/comfyui/history_done.json", "tests/engines/fixtures/comfyui/view.json", "tests/engines/fixtures/comfyui/last_smoke.json", "examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.yaml", "examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.graph.json"], "verifyCommand": "KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS=1 pixi run pytest tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py -v -s", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MP4 100KB-50MB with valid ftyp magic", "3 comfy fixtures committed with _meta", "last_smoke.json committed", "real custom_nodes SHAs (no PINME)", "real model paths resolve on HF", "graph.json is exported real workflow", "each bug -> atomic commit with regression test", "final clean-pod run destroys cleanly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Layer P Task 8: Refactor offline ComfyUIBackend tests to fixture-replay
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Refactor 23 hand-crafted-dict tests in test_comfyui.py to load from Task 7 fixtures. Add tests/engines/conftest.py with shared _load_comfy_fixture helper.

**Files:**
- Create: tests/engines/conftest.py
- Modify: tests/engines/test_comfyui.py

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/engines/conftest.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["conftest._load_comfy_fixture exists", "no inline hand-crafted shape in test bodies", "all 23 refactored tests pass", "real-shape divergences either updated in test or fixed as production bug in Task 7"]}
```

tasks.subject: Layer P Task 9: ComfyUI shape-lockdown tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 3 tests locking ComfyUI HTTP response contract. Future schema upgrades that break these fail loudly.

**Files:**
- Modify: tests/engines/test_comfyui.py

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v -k "shape or required_keys"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/engines/test_comfyui.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v -k 'shape or required_keys'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["prompt_id present + non-empty string", "history body has status.completed=True and non-empty outputs", "view.json request_url matches /view?filename= regex"]}
```

tasks.subject: Layer P Task 10: README + PROGRESS Phase 26 + final gate + merge
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document Layer P. Full offline gate. Merge to main via --no-ff.

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md
- Modify: PROGRESS.md
- Merge: build/layer-p -> main

**Verify:** pixi run test && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README has engine integration sub-section", "PROGRESS Phase 26 entry with per-task SHAs + bug catches + spend", "Single next action updated", "Layer-O carry-forward #1 marked CLOSED", "offline gate green", "merged via --no-ff with substantive body"]}
```
